---
title: "Pheast_openpedcan"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## LOADING In dataset

Dataset: openpedcan V15

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(httr2)
library(jsonlite)

base_url <- "https://cbioportal-api.ccdi.cancer.gov/api"
study_id <- "openpedcan_v15"

test_req <- request(paste0(base_url, "/studies/", study_id)) %>%
  req_perform()

resp_status(test_req)
resp_content_type(test_req)

body_text <- resp_body_string(test_req)
substr(body_text, 1, 500)

test_study <- test_req %>%
  resp_body_json(simplifyVector = TRUE)

test_study$name
test_study$description
```

```{r}
expr_profile_id <- "openpedcan_v15_rna_seq_v2_mrna"
sample_list_id  <- "openpedcan_v15_rna_seq_v2_mrna"

cd24_entrez <- 100133941
```

```{r}
cd24_expr <- request(paste0(base_url, "/molecular-profiles/", expr_profile_id, "/molecular-data/fetch")) %>%
  req_method("POST") %>%
  req_body_json(list(
    entrezGeneIds = list(cd24_entrez),
    sampleListId = sample_list_id
  )) %>%
  req_perform() %>%
  resp_body_json(simplifyVector = TRUE) %>%
  as_tibble()

cd24_expr_clean <- cd24_expr %>%
  transmute(
    sampleId = sampleId,
    patientId = patientId,
    CD24_expr = as.numeric(value)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(CD24_expr))

head(cd24_expr_clean)
summary(cd24_expr_clean$CD24_expr)
nrow(cd24_expr_clean)
```

```{r}
openped_clinical_sample <- request(paste0(base_url, "/studies/", study_id, "/clinical-data")) %>%
  req_url_query(
    clinicalDataType = "SAMPLE",
    projection = "DETAILED"
  ) %>%
  req_perform() %>%
  resp_body_json(simplifyVector = TRUE) %>%
  as_tibble()

openped_clinical_patient <- request(paste0(base_url, "/studies/", study_id, "/clinical-data")) %>%
  req_url_query(
    clinicalDataType = "PATIENT",
    projection = "DETAILED"
  ) %>%
  req_perform() %>%
  resp_body_json(simplifyVector = TRUE) %>%
  as_tibble()

```

```{r}
openped_clinical_sample_wide <- openped_clinical_sample %>%
  select(sampleId, patientId, clinicalAttributeId, value) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = clinicalAttributeId,
    values_from = value,
    values_fn = first
  )

openped_clinical_patient_wide <- openped_clinical_patient %>%
  select(patientId, clinicalAttributeId, value) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = clinicalAttributeId,
    values_from = value,
    values_fn = first
  )

openped_clinical <- openped_clinical_sample_wide %>%
  left_join(openped_clinical_patient_wide, by = "patientId")
```

```{r}
names(openped_clinical)[str_detect(
  names(openped_clinical),
  regex("OS|SURV|DEATH|VITAL|STATUS|MONTH|DAYS", ignore_case = TRUE)
)]
```

```{r}
names(openped_clinical)[str_detect(
  names(openped_clinical),
  regex("CANCER|DIAG|TUMOR|ONCOTREE|HISTOLOGY|DISEASE", ignore_case = TRUE)
)]
```

```{r}
expr_profile_id <- "openpedcan_v15_rna_seq_v2_mrna"
sample_list_id  <- "openpedcan_v15_rna_seq_v2_mrna"

cd24_entrez <- 100133941

cd24_expr <- request(paste0(base_url, "/molecular-profiles/", expr_profile_id, "/molecular-data/fetch")) %>%
  req_method("POST") %>%
  req_body_json(list(
    entrezGeneIds = list(cd24_entrez),
    sampleListId = sample_list_id
  )) %>%
  req_perform() %>%
  resp_body_json(simplifyVector = TRUE) %>%
  as_tibble()

cd24_expr_clean <- cd24_expr %>%
  transmute(
    sampleId = sampleId,
    patientId = patientId,
    CD24_expr = as.numeric(value)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(CD24_expr))
```

```{r}
openped_cd24_surv <- cd24_expr_clean %>%
  left_join(openped_clinical, by = c("sampleId", "patientId"))

dim(openped_cd24_surv)
head(openped_cd24_surv)
```

### Filtering:

```{r}

openped_cd24_surv_clean <- openped_cd24_surv %>%
  mutate(
    openped_cancer_type = CANCER_TYPE_DETAILED,
    openped_os_months = as.numeric(OS_MONTHS),
    openped_os_event = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_upper(OS_STATUS), "DECEASED|DEAD|1:") ~ 1,
      str_detect(str_to_upper(OS_STATUS), "LIVING|ALIVE|0:") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(openped_cancer_type),
    !is.na(CD24_expr),
    !is.na(openped_os_months),
    !is.na(openped_os_event)
  )
```

```{r}
openped_cd24_surv_clean %>%
  summarise(
    openped_n_samples = n(),
    openped_n_patients = n_distinct(patientId),
    openped_n_cancer_types = n_distinct(openped_cancer_type),
    openped_deaths = sum(openped_os_event == 1),
    openped_censored = sum(openped_os_event == 0)
  )
```

#### Median CD24 cutoff within each cancer type:

```{r}

openped_cd24_surv_median <- openped_cd24_surv_clean %>%
  group_by(openped_cancer_type) %>%
  mutate(
    openped_cancer_type_median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    openped_CD24_group = if_else(
      CD24_expr >= openped_cancer_type_median_CD24,
      "CD24 High",
      "CD24 Low"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    openped_CD24_group = factor(openped_CD24_group, levels = c("CD24 Low", "CD24 High"))
  )
```

```{r}
openped_cd24_surv_median %>%
  count(openped_CD24_group)
```

```{r}
openped_cd24_surv_median %>%
  count(openped_cancer_type, openped_CD24_group) %>%
  arrange(openped_cancer_type, openped_CD24_group)
```

### CD24 Kaplan-Meier:

```{r}

library(survival)

openped_cd24_fit <- survfit(
  Surv(openped_os_months, openped_os_event) ~ openped_CD24_group,
  data = openped_cd24_surv_median
)
```

```{r}
plot(
  openped_cd24_fit,
  col = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  lwd = 2,
  xlab = "Overall Survival Time (Months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival Probability"
)

legend(
  "bottomleft",
  legend = levels(openped_cd24_surv_median$openped_CD24_group),
  col = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  lwd = 2,
  bty = "n"
)
```

```{r}
openped_cd24_logrank <- survdiff(
  Surv(openped_os_months, openped_os_event) ~ openped_CD24_group,
  data = openped_cd24_surv_median
)

openped_cd24_pvalue <- 1 - pchisq(
  openped_cd24_logrank$chisq,
  length(openped_cd24_logrank$n) - 1
)

openped_cd24_pvalue
```

**Different package for better risk table:**

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(survival)
library(survminer)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Age filter first, then median CD24 split within cancer type
# ------------------------------------------------------------

openped_cd24_surv_median <- openped_cd24_surv_clean %>%
  mutate(openped_age = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AGE))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(openped_age), openped_age < 18) %>%
  group_by(openped_cancer_type) %>%
  mutate(
    openped_cancer_type_median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    openped_CD24_group = if_else(
      CD24_expr >= openped_cancer_type_median_CD24,
      "CD24 High tumors",
      "CD24 Low tumors"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    openped_CD24_group = factor(
      openped_CD24_group,
      levels = c("CD24 Low tumors", "CD24 High tumors")
    )
  )

# Check counts after filtering
openped_cd24_surv_median %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patientId),
    n_cancer_types = n_distinct(openped_cancer_type),
    deaths = sum(openped_os_event == 1),
    censored = sum(openped_os_event == 0)
  )

openped_cd24_surv_median %>%
  count(openped_CD24_group)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Kaplan-Meier fit
# ------------------------------------------------------------

openped_cd24_fit <- survfit(
  Surv(openped_os_months, openped_os_event) ~ openped_CD24_group,
  data = openped_cd24_surv_median
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Log-rank test
# ------------------------------------------------------------

openped_cd24_logrank <- survdiff(
  Surv(openped_os_months, openped_os_event) ~ openped_CD24_group,
  data = openped_cd24_surv_median
)

openped_cd24_pvalue <- 1 - pchisq(
  openped_cd24_logrank$chisq,
  length(openped_cd24_logrank$n) - 1
)

# Print log-rank results to check
openped_cd24_logrank
openped_cd24_pvalue
paste0("Log-rank p = ", signif(openped_cd24_pvalue, 3))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Kaplan-Meier plot with risk table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

openped_cd24_plot <- ggsurvplot(
  openped_cd24_fit,
  data = openped_cd24_surv_median,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  risk.table.title = "Number at risk",
  risk.table.height = 0.32,
  break.time.by = 100,
  xlim = c(0, 300),
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival Probability",
  legend.title = "",
  legend.labs = c("CD24 Low tumors", "CD24 High tumors"),
  legend = "top",
  palette = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  pval = paste0("Log-rank p = ", signif(openped_cd24_pvalue, 3)),
  pval.coord = c(5, 0.06),
  pval.size = 5,
  conf.int = FALSE,
  censor = TRUE,
  risk.table.y.text = TRUE,
  risk.table.y.text.col = TRUE,
  fontsize = 5,
  ggtheme = theme_classic(base_size = 18),
  tables.theme = theme_cleantable(base_size = 16)
)

# Main plot formatting
openped_cd24_plot$plot <- openped_cd24_plot$plot +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 22),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 20, b = 5, l = 20)
  )

# Risk table formatting
# This avoids the axis.text.y merge error
openped_cd24_plot$table <- openped_cd24_plot$table +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 10, l = 20)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save to Desktop and show in Quarto
# ------------------------------------------------------------

png(
  "~/Desktop/openped_CD24_Kaplan_Meier_OS_months_risk_table_poster_fixed_1.png",
  width = 2500,
  height = 2000,
  res = 300
)

print(openped_cd24_plot)

dev.off()

knitr::include_graphics(
  "~/Desktop/openped_CD24_Kaplan_Meier_OS_months_risk_table_poster_fixed_1.png"
)
```

X-Axis As days not months :

```{r}
openped_cd24_surv_median <- openped_cd24_surv_median %>%
  mutate(
    openped_os_days = openped_os_months * 30.44
  )

openped_cd24_fit_days <- survfit(
  Surv(openped_os_days, openped_os_event) ~ openped_CD24_group,
  data = openped_cd24_surv_median
)

png(
  "openped_CD24_Kaplan_Meier_OS_days_median_within_cancer_type.png",
  width = 1600,
  height = 1200,
  res = 200
)

plot(
  openped_cd24_fit_days,
  col = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  lwd = 2,
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Days)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival Probability"
)

legend(
  "bottomleft",
  legend = levels(openped_cd24_surv_median$openped_CD24_group),
  col = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  lwd = 2,
  bty = "n"
)

text(
  x = max(openped_cd24_surv_median$openped_os_days, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.75,
  y = 0.9,
  labels = paste0("Log-rank p = ", signif(openped_cd24_pvalue, 3))
)

dev.off()
knitr::include_graphics("openped_CD24_Kaplan_Meier_OS_days_median_within_cancer_type.png")
```

### SIGLEC10

```{r}
openped_siglec10_entrez <- 89790
```

```{r}
openped_siglec10_expr <- request(paste0(base_url, "/molecular-profiles/", expr_profile_id, "/molecular-data/fetch")) %>%
  req_method("POST") %>%
  req_body_json(list(
    entrezGeneIds = list(openped_siglec10_entrez),
    sampleListId = sample_list_id
  )) %>%
  req_perform() %>%
  resp_body_json(simplifyVector = TRUE) %>%
  as_tibble()

openped_siglec10_expr_clean <- openped_siglec10_expr %>%
  transmute(
    sampleId = sampleId,
    patientId = patientId,
    SIGLEC10_expr = as.numeric(value)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(SIGLEC10_expr))

head(openped_siglec10_expr_clean)
summary(openped_siglec10_expr_clean$SIGLEC10_expr)
nrow(openped_siglec10_expr_clean)
```

```{r}
openped_siglec10_surv <- openped_siglec10_expr_clean %>%
  left_join(openped_clinical, by = c("sampleId", "patientId"))

dim(openped_siglec10_surv)
head(openped_siglec10_surv)
```

### Filter SIGLEC10 Data:

```{r}
openped_siglec10_surv_clean <- openped_siglec10_surv %>%
  mutate(
    openped_cancer_type = CANCER_TYPE_DETAILED,
    openped_os_months = as.numeric(OS_MONTHS),
    openped_os_event = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_upper(OS_STATUS), "DECEASED|DEAD|1:") ~ 1,
      str_detect(str_to_upper(OS_STATUS), "LIVING|ALIVE|0:") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(openped_cancer_type),
    !is.na(SIGLEC10_expr),
    !is.na(openped_os_months),
    !is.na(openped_os_event)
  )
```

```{r}
#checking # of samples that remain
openped_siglec10_surv_clean %>%
  summarise(
    openped_n_samples = n(),
    openped_n_patients = n_distinct(patientId),
    openped_n_cancer_types = n_distinct(openped_cancer_type),
    openped_deaths = sum(openped_os_event == 1),
    openped_censored = sum(openped_os_event == 0)
  )
```

#### Median SIGLEC10 cutoff within each cancer type:

```{r}
openped_siglec10_surv_median <- openped_siglec10_surv_clean %>%
  group_by(openped_cancer_type) %>%
  mutate(
    openped_cancer_type_median_SIGLEC10 = median(SIGLEC10_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    openped_SIGLEC10_group = if_else(
      SIGLEC10_expr >= openped_cancer_type_median_SIGLEC10,
      "SIGLEC10 High",
      "SIGLEC10 Low"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    openped_SIGLEC10_group = factor(
      openped_SIGLEC10_group,
      levels = c("SIGLEC10 Low", "SIGLEC10 High")
    )
  )
```

```{r}
openped_siglec10_surv_median %>%
  count(openped_SIGLEC10_group)

openped_siglec10_surv_median %>%
  count(openped_cancer_type, openped_SIGLEC10_group) %>%
  arrange(openped_cancer_type, openped_SIGLEC10_group)

```

### SIGLEC10 Kaplan-Meier:

```{r}
library(survival)

openped_siglec10_fit <- survfit(
  Surv(openped_os_months, openped_os_event) ~ openped_SIGLEC10_group,
  data = openped_siglec10_surv_median
)

openped_siglec10_logrank <- survdiff(
  Surv(openped_os_months, openped_os_event) ~ openped_SIGLEC10_group,
  data = openped_siglec10_surv_median
)

openped_siglec10_pvalue <- 1 - pchisq(
  openped_siglec10_logrank$chisq,
  length(openped_siglec10_logrank$n) - 1
)

openped_siglec10_logrank
openped_siglec10_pvalue
```

```{r}

#months
png(
  "openped_SIGLEC10_Kaplan_Meier_OS_months_median_within_cancer_type.png",
  width = 1600,
  height = 1200,
  res = 200
)

plot(
  openped_siglec10_fit,
  col = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  lwd = 2,
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival Probability"
)

legend(
  "bottomleft",
  legend = levels(openped_siglec10_surv_median$openped_SIGLEC10_group),
  col = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  lwd = 2,
  bty = "n"
)

text(
  x = max(openped_siglec10_surv_median$openped_os_months, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.75,
  y = 0.9,
  labels = paste0("Log-rank p = ", signif(openped_siglec10_pvalue, 3))
)

dev.off()

knitr::include_graphics("openped_SIGLEC10_Kaplan_Meier_OS_months_median_within_cancer_type.png")
```

```{r}
# days 
openped_siglec10_surv_median <- openped_siglec10_surv_median %>%
  mutate(
    openped_os_days = openped_os_months * 30.44
  )

openped_siglec10_fit_days <- survfit(
  Surv(openped_os_days, openped_os_event) ~ openped_SIGLEC10_group,
  data = openped_siglec10_surv_median
)

png(
  "openped_SIGLEC10_Kaplan_Meier_OS_days_median_within_cancer_type.png",
  width = 1600,
  height = 1200,
  res = 200
)

plot(
  openped_siglec10_fit_days,
  col = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  lwd = 2,
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Days)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival Probability"
)

legend(
  "bottomleft",
  legend = levels(openped_siglec10_surv_median$openped_SIGLEC10_group),
  col = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  lwd = 2,
  bty = "n"
)

text(
  x = max(openped_siglec10_surv_median$openped_os_days, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.75,
  y = 0.9,
  labels = paste0("Log-rank p = ", signif(openped_siglec10_pvalue, 3))
)

dev.off()

knitr::include_graphics("openped_SIGLEC10_Kaplan_Meier_OS_days_median_within_cancer_type.png")
```
